object_a.label: wall feature
object_a.long_form_open_description: Standard white rectangular rocker light switch mounted on the left wall at typical switch height near the bottom of the steps; plate contrasts with the beige wall.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: on the left wall near the base of the stairs and above the baseboard
object_a.object_text_long: left sector | Standard white rectangular rocker light switch mounted on the left wall at typical switch height near the bottom of the steps; plate contrasts with the beige wall.
object_a.text_input_for_clip_long: left sector | Standard white rectangular rocker light switch mounted on the left wall at typical switch height near the bottom of the steps; plate contrasts with the beige wall.

object_b.label: lamp
object_b.description: table lamp on small side table near couch
object_b.long_form_open_description: A small table lamp with a light-colored shade sits on a side table next to the near end of the couch. Provides soft localized lighting and is accompanied by small decorative items and possibly a plant.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: On a small table between the couch and the hallway opening; near a potted plant
